title: Fix Inconsistent CSS Grid Layout with Dynamic Row Height Calculation

statement.markdown: Given a CSS grid container with dynamic item heights, implement a function to calculate the total height of the grid container. The grid container has a specified number of rows and columns, and each item has a specified height. The function should return the total height of the grid container, taking into account the height of each item and any gaps between items.
statement.inputFormat: Input is a JSON object containing the grid container properties: `rows`, `columns`, and a list of `items` with their respective `heights`.
statement.outputFormat: The total height of the grid container as a number.
statement.notes: The grid container uses a grid layout with a specified number of rows and columns. Each item has a specified height, and there are gaps between items. The function should calculate the total height of the grid container based on these properties.

constraints.description: The number of rows in the grid container.
The number of columns in the grid container.

examples.explanation: The total height of the grid container is the sum of the heights of all items, including the gaps between them.

prerequisites: Basic knowledge of CSS Grid Layout
